name: tpi-channel-bedrock
description: Bedrock-channel index. Same 16 ATPI members, selectors restricted to hyperscaler='aws' (AWS Bedrock). Only 4 of ATPI's 16 frontier members are invocable on Bedrock in our catalog (the 3 Claude models + Mistral Large 3). The 12 unresolved members demonstrate the deployment-channel gap: most frontier capability (GPT-5.x, Gemini, Grok, DeepSeek, etc.) is not available on AWS-hosted Bedrock today.
selection_rule: ATPI 16 members, hyperscaler == 'aws' filter (first matching record per family — pricing is approximately uniform across Bedrock regions for most models)

members.label: GPT-5.5
